tool_args.label: Kings Highway Curbside Changes
tool_args.raw_text: KINGS HIGHWAY CURBSIDE CHANGES - A detailed map of the Kings Highway area in Brooklyn, showing proposed curbside changes.

tool_args.label: Kings Highway Corridor
tool_args.raw_text: Kings Highway corridor in Brooklyn, showing proposed curbside changes. Install 28 truck loading zones along the 2-mile corridor.

payload.description: Kings Highway corridor in Brooklyn showing proposed curbside changes

tool_args.label: Kings Highway Curbside Changes
tool_args.raw_text: KINGS HIGHWAY CURBSIDE CHANGES. Install bus lanes along 8 block faces. Add/lengthen 4 turn bays. Move B/Q taxi stand around the corner to E 16 St. Install 28 truck loading zones along the 2-mile corridor. Add metered parking along 13 commercial blocks.

payload.description: Proposed curbside changes along Kings Highway including bus lanes, truck loading zones, turn bays, taxi stand relocation, and parking changes

tool_args.label: Bus Lanes along Kings Highway
tool_args.raw_text: Red line = Bus Lane (7 AM - 7 PM all days). Install bus lanes along 8 block faces.

payload.description: Install bus lanes along 8 block faces

tool_args.label: Turn Bays on Kings Highway
tool_args.raw_text: Green line = No Standing Anytime for Turn Bay. Add/lengthen 4 turn bays.

payload.description: Add/lengthen 4 turn bays

tool_args.label: B/Q Taxi Stand Relocation
tool_args.raw_text: Yellow line = Taxi Stand Relocation from Kings Hwy to E 16 St. Move B/Q taxi stand around the corner to E 16 St.

payload.description: Move B/Q taxi stand around the corner to E 16 St
payload.location_text: from Kings Hwy to E 16 St, Brooklyn

normalized_location.raw_text: from Kings Hwy to E 16 St, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Truck Loading Zones along Kings Highway
tool_args.raw_text: Install 28 truck loading zones along the 2-mile corridor, average 2-3 spots each, active from mid-morning to early afternoon to follow street sweeping.

payload.description: Install 28 truck loading zones along the 2-mile corridor, average 2-3 spots each, active from mid-morning to early afternoon to follow street sweeping

tool_args.label: Metered Parking Additions on Kings Highway
tool_args.raw_text: Add metered parking along 13 commercial blocks (purple).
